subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hello Bob,

Thanks for following up from Vendor Inc. We'd be happy to schedule a formal meeting to discuss potential collaboration.

Here are our available slots next week:
- April 21, 2026 (Tuesday) at 14:00–16:00
- April 22, 2026 (Wednesday) at 14:00–16:00
- April 23, 2026 (Thursday) at 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which time works for you.

As for your request for direct contact details for our senior leadership, I'm not able to share internal contact information or personnel directory data. I recommend visiting our public website for official contact channels.

Looking forward to our conversation.

Best regards
